brand_identity.name: Kishan Real Estates
brand_identity.tagline: Your Trusted Property Partner in BEML Layout and Rajarajeshwari Nagar
brand_identity.mission: To capture serious property inquiries through trust and clarity.

design_philosophy.archetype: Organic & Earthy (Trust/Growth) mixed with Swiss Utility
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Real Estate Reliability with Modern Hospitality.
Emotion First: Every section must build trust.
Content is King: Direct, clear communication without aggressive sales tactics.
Negative Space: Use generous padding to signal luxury and calm.
anti_patterns: No generic 'blue' everywhere - balance with warm gray and gold.
No clutter - keep the form simple.

navbar.style: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60
elements: Logo (Left): Text 'Kishan Real Estates' with Lucide 'House' icon replacing the 'H'. Colors: Deep Blue (#1E3A8A) and Cyan/Teal (#06B6D4).
Desktop Links (Center): Hidden on mobile, visible on md+.
Mobile Menu (Right): Hamburger icon triggering a sheet/drawer.

hero.style: relative overflow-hidden bg-secondary/30 pt-16 md:pt-24 lg:pt-32 pb-16
hero.layout: Two-column on desktop: Left Content (Headline, Subhead, Trust Indicators), Right Form (Sticky Lead Capture).
hero.visuals: Background pattern or subtle gradient. Hero image of a modern home blended or placed as a featured visual.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2563EB] hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] text-white rounded-md px-8 py-3 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1F2937] border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:border-gray-300 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#128C7E] text-white rounded-full p-4 fixed bottom-6 right-6 shadow-2xl z-50 hover:scale-110 transition-transform

cards.property: group overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1. Image aspect-video. Content p-6.
cards.feature: bg-white rounded-lg p-8 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:border-blue-100 transition-colors

form.style: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl p-8 border border-gray-100

assets.icons: Use Lucide React (House, Phone, MapPin, Star, ShieldCheck, Users, Key, ChevronDown, Menu, X, CheckCircle)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #1F2937 or darker on light backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (blue-500).
accessibility.aria_labels: Buttons with icons only (like WhatsApp) must have aria-label.
accessibility.alt_text: All property images must have descriptive alt text.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Logo Implementation: Create a component <Logo /> that renders the text 'Kishan Real Estates' but replaces the 'H' with a styled <House /> icon from lucide-react. Use the specified colors.

3. Hero Section: Build a high-trust hero. headline: 'Find Your Dream Home in BEML Layout & RR Nagar'. Subhead: 'Trust the local experts with 12+ years of experience.'. The Lead Form should be visible immediately on desktop.
4. Navigation: Ensure Smooth Scroll to sections (#properties, #about, #contact).
5. Mobile: Ensure the 'Call' and 'WhatsApp' buttons are easily accessible on mobile (sticky bottom bar or prominent in nav).
6. Maps: Use a simple Button 'Open in Google Maps' linking to the address coordinates, do not embed an iframe to keep performance high.
7. Testing: Add data-testid to the form, submit button, and nav links.
universal_guidelines: Use plenty of whitespace (p-12, p-16, p-24) between sections.
Animation should be 'fade-up' with small distance (20px) and duration (0.5s).
Use 'sonner' for form submission success/error toasts.
